corrections.old_value: Constitutive BR signaling may produce broad growth alterations
corrections.reason: Potential pleiotropic tradeoffs of constitutive BR signaling are not tested in this paper.

corrections.old_value: Activated BES1 signaling could compensate for cell-wall-associated growth defects, but constitutive BR response likely has strong pleiotropic effects.
corrections.reason: This is speculative application language not experimentally supported by the paper.
